docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEARNY-COLUMBUS ASS LLC(A CA LTD LIABILITY CO) AS TO DEFENDANT ROLF, NANCY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLF, NANCY
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLF, NANCY

DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEARNY-COLUMBUS ASS LLC(A CA LTD LIABILITY CO) SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-16-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-23-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ROLF, NANCY
ROOM #503A JUDGE PROTEM: DAVID YANG; CLERK: E. ESTACIO C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. J.T. DATE OF 8/23/99 STANDS.
DEFENDANT:NANCY ROLF TO PAY FIRST APPEARANCE FEE ON DATE OF TRIAL-23/AUG/99
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON AUG-23-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

AJROBERTSON, JUDGE; JJASMIN, CLERK; PEVEZICH, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. WIT S/E. DOC EVID INTRO & W/D. JUDGMENT RENDERED FOR PLNTF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES, BUT STAYED UNTIL AUG 30, 1999. PLNTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AND OBTAIN APPROVAL AS TO FORM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLF, NANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 KEARNY ST, RM. 96, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94133, LEASE FORFEITED
